para_trans: Additional charge of Dr. Pramod Naik. the Director,
Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education, Mumbai
Department of Higher and Technical Education
Dr. Vinod Mohitkar, Director, Directorate of Technical Education, Mumbai dated 30.06.2026
Retiring from government service at the prescribed age. Accordingly, for administrative reasons.
Additional charge of the post of Director, Directorate of Technical Education, Mumbai is given to Dr. Pramod Naik in the following order:
The Director is being handed over to the Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education, Mumbai.
2. Dr. Pramod Naik, Director, Maharashtra State Board of Technical Education, Mumbai holds the additional charge of the post.
The charge should be carried out taking care of the duties and responsibilities of their current position.
3. The said orders shall come into force with immediate effect.
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
